description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof that doubles as a spacious rooftop terrace. The upper level features multiple seating areas, including tables, chairs, and a large umbrella, all enclosed by a metal railing. The lower level has large glass sliding doors and windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor patio. The structure is primarily rectangular with clean, straight lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and openness. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, with metal railings and glass elements adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The house includes a garage door, a main entryway, and several outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat rooftop terrace, large glass windows, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The design is clean and functional, with metal railings and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass doors, and a covered patio area beneath the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof terrace, metal railings, and a mix of windows on both stories.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a garage door, secondary entry, and a staircase leading to the rooftop terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying symmetrical window placement and the full extent of the rooftop terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, covered patio, and minimal decorative elements
